title: 220 Pcs 12x16 in(30.5x40.6cm) Unbleached Parchment Paper Baking Sheets, Baklicious Pre-Cut Heavy Duty Parchment Baking Paper for Air Fryer, Oven, Bakeware, Steaming, Cooking Bread, Cupcake, Cookies
features: PRECUT BAKING PARCHMENT SHEETS - By using our pre-cut 12x16 parchment, eliminating the cutting step of cooking, everyone who uses Baklicious baking parchment can enjoy the cooking process. Neatly cut parchment fits perfectly on your baking sheet and also reduces paper waste.
HEALTHY & NON-TOXIC -- Baklicious parchment sheets made from natural 100% wood pulp and totally fluorescent free without chemical composition. you can put your foods on it without hesitation.

HIGHT QUALITY & STRONG--Our parchment paper sheets for baking 40gsm and has a certain thickness,it will not soak through when cooking moist food or tear when transferring your cookies from sheet pan to cooling rack.

NON-STICK--Grease&water proofing Baklicious pre-cut parchment paper for baking apply food grade silicone oil on both sides that eliminates the food sticking to the paper during baking. Processed food by Baklicious half sheet parchment paper with almost no clean up.

MULTI-PURPOSE -- Baklicious parchment baking sheets ’s temperature resistance is from -68 to 450 degrees Fahrenheit, so Baklicious pre-cut parchment paper can be used not only in the oven but also in the refrigerator and the microwave.
